title: Where to Save My Notes
notes:
Do I give Maxwell access to my Notion, or save allow Read, Write, but not delete access on existing files? Essentially I want to do a brain dump of all of my historical notes. Use this as the main source for putting content out there?

Example - listed to My First Millions podcast where the co-host Shaun Puri shared his learnings from "Billionaire Basketball Bootcamp" which he co-hosted with Mr. Beast. Some interesting tidbits included:
- "Everyone likes Checkmate, but do you like playing chess?"... meaning yeah it's fun to win, but hard to play.
- "Can't replace pigs with pigs" - a Walt Disney quote that innovation needs to be novel.
- My own takeaway that the best thing to do ever is to start a company. You're not maximizing your luck - genetic lottery, legal system, timing - etc. if you aren't. 
- Successful people aren't necessarily always more special... at times they're simply bolder or have more endurance, which is special though. 
- So many stories of almost failing! e.g. Airbnb
- Solve 3 problems a day - Matt Ishiba - means you'll solve 1000 problems/year. 
- Pick ideas with a large enough TAM.

title: Wireframe the website beta and complete feature list
notes: [IN PROGRESS] Created FAR-wireframe.html with 5 pages: Homepage (Futurepedia hero), Search Results (filters + grid), Firm Profile (stats + details), Comparison (side-by-side table), Dashboard (saved firms). Feature list in FAR-features.md.

title: Update database with refreshed ADV data on 3/31/2026
Research alternative data sources beyond the ADV
Build out firm logo database
notes: Add logos for more firms. Use web scraping, SEC website, firm websites, or API services. Run overnight task to process in bulk.

title: Implement AI-based semantic search
notes: Natural language search: 'I have $2mm and want an advisor in Boston focused on impact investing'. Use embeddings + vector DB (Supabase pgvector). Providers: OpenAI/Voyage embeddings, LLM for query parsing. See research/FAR-ai-search-plan.md

title: Connect Supabase database to frontend
notes: Planning: Public read for firm data, RLS for user data, service role for admin. API: PostgREST for public, Next.js API routes for leads/auth. Security: RLS policies, rate limiting, webhook verification. COMPLETED: Added Supabase client, RLS policies for public read, search and firm pages now fetch real data.

title: Implement search with filters (name, tags, location, AUM)
notes: Search page now has: search bar, location filter, fee structure checkboxes, minimum AUM dropdown, specialty checkboxes. Filters apply to sample data. Connected to Supabase.

title: Create firm profile page with Supabase data
notes: Created /firm/[crd] page fetching from Supabase. Shows: firm info, AUM, fee tiers, profile text, services, contact, quick facts.

title: Aggregate email addresses for initial launch
Research the best SEO / social / paid methods
Research best methods to get this off the ground
Create firm_changes + tracked_advisors tables in Supabase
notes: firm_changes: id, crd, field_name, old_value, new_value, detected_at. tracked_advisors: id, user_id, crd, notify_email, created_at. Add RLS policies for user-scoped reads/writes.

title: Build SEC data change detection (diff on ingestion)
notes: On each SEC data refresh, compare new rows against firmdata_current. Log diffs (AUM, fees, client count, disclosures) to firm_changes table. Start with snapshot-diff approach (Option A).

title: Add 'Track This Advisor' button to firm profile page
notes: Toggle button on /firm/[crd]. Inserts/deletes from tracked_advisors. Requires auth — prompt sign-up if not logged in. Show filled/unfilled bell icon.

title: Build /dashboard/alerts page — tracked firms + changes feed
notes: Replace placeholder. Show list of tracked firms with recent changes. Change cards: 'AUM decreased 15% ($2.1B → $1.8B)' with date. Sort by most recent activity.

title: Add API routes for advisor tracking (CRUD + changes feed)
notes: GET/POST/DELETE /api/user/tracked-advisors. GET /api/firm-changes?crd=X for change history. Auth required. Rate limited.

title: Email notifications for tracked advisor changes (Phase 2)
notes: Requires email provider (Resend or SendGrid). Send digest when tracked firms have new changes. Not blocking for initial launch — in-app first.

title: Wire up Negotiate page with real fee data
notes: The /negotiate page currently uses hardcoded INDUSTRY_ALL data. Need to: 1) Run migration 003_industry_averages.sql in Supabase, 2) Fetch real industry averages from DB, 3) Optionally allow firm-specific comparison when coming from a firm profile.
